description: Friends & Social Graph — a persistent bidirectional relationship layer on top of the ephemeral companion system. Add friends (3 paths), invite friends to companion meetups, persistent DMs, read-only profiles, and APNs push. Reuses FF_COMPANION. iOS uses xcodebuild build/test (NOT web typecheck); NEW .swift files MUST run `cd apps/ios && xcodegen` before building or they are not in the target (cannot-find-in-scope). UI verified via Simulator screenshots (simctl), not dev-browser. Source PRD: tasks/prd-friends-social-graph.md. Design: docs/FRIENDS_DESIGN.md.

userStories.title: core friend.ts contract
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the friend data contract in packages/core so TS and Swift stay in sync.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/core/src/friend.ts defines FriendshipId, FriendRequestId, FriendCode, FriendRequestStatus, FriendRequestSource, FriendRequest, Friendship, DevicePushToken
Exported from index.ts; registered in parity TS_GLOBS, SCHEMA_INTERFACES, NAMED_ALIASES
pnpm parity:check passes
userStories.notes: DONE — committed 84f8638. friend.ts + parity registration green.

userStories.title: Swift models FriendRequest / Friendship
userStories.description: As an iOS developer, I need Swift structs mirroring the core contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Models/FriendRequest.swift + Models/Friendship.swift mirror friend.ts (RawRepresentable IDs, Codable, decodeIfPresent)
Friendship has otherUserId(viewer:) + orderedPair helper + sample
pnpm parity:check passes
xcodebuild build passes
userStories.notes: DONE — committed 84f8638. parity green, BUILD SUCCEEDED.

userStories.title: Backend migration 0008_friends.sql + RLS
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend tables with RLS so friend data is secure.
acceptanceCriteria: infra/supabase/migrations/0008_friends.sql creates friend_requests, friendships (ordered-pair unique), friend_codes, device_push_tokens
RLS policies restrict access to relationship participants; conversations.request_id relaxed to NULL
sc_touch_updated_at triggers applied

userStories.title: SwiftData v1.3 migration (2 friend tables)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need persistent local storage for friendships and requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Persistence/Models/FriendRequestRecord.swift + FriendshipRecord.swift (@Model with asValue/init(from:))
SoloCompassSchemaV1_3 + lightweight stage v1_2->v1_3; both ModelContainer(for:) append the two tables
Does NOT pass migrationPlan: explicitly (avoid NSLightweightMigrationStage boot crash)
xcodebuild build passes
xcodebuild test passes

userStories.title: FriendshipStateMachine pure functions + tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pure state machine governing relationship transitions so logic is testable.
acceptanceCriteria: Services/FriendshipStateMachine.swift: transition(state,event) + resolveSendRequest
Implements mutual-pending fold, already-friends no-op, blocked silent-drop
Tests/FriendshipStateMachineTests.swift covers all legal/illegal transitions + special rules
xcodebuild test passes (real suite name, Executed N>0)
userStories.notes: DONE — committed 805a32f + c2ba8a4. 11 tests passed, 0 failures.

userStories.title: FriendService core
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service orchestrating friend operations against backend + local store.
acceptanceCriteria: Services/FriendService.swift (@MainActor @Observable): sendRequest/accept/decline/withdraw/refresh/unfriend/relationState/friendCount
Gated by FeatureFlags.companion; flag off returns empty success (local-first preserved)
unfriend(block:true) also writes companion_blocks
xcodebuild build passes

userStories.title: MeSheet hub + map avatar entry
userStories.description: As a user, I want a personal hub reachable from the map for my profile and social.
acceptanceCriteria: Top-right emoji avatar bubble on CompassMapView in safe-area overlay (avoid status-bar collision)
Tapping presents MeSheet (NavigationStack) with ProfileHeader + Friends/Messages/Companion/Settings sections
Red dot on avatar when there are pending friend requests
NEW .swift files: run `cd apps/ios && xcodegen` before building
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator with simctl screenshot (bubble placement + sheet)
userStories.notes: First UI story. Avatar overlay must respect safe area (see project_mapcontrols_safearea_collision).

userStories.title: MyProfileEditView (upgrade CompanionProfileView)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit my avatar, handle, bio, and languages in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse/extract CompanionProfileView: emoji picker, bio (<=280), languages multi-select
Add displayHandle editing (length 2-20, not unique)
Save writes CompanionProfile + User.displayHandle
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator: changing handle/emoji persists across reopen

userStories.title: FriendProfileView read-only profile
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view another user's profile to decide to add/invite/message them.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuse CompanionProfileView layout (large emoji on gradient, handle, bio, languages with flags)
Trust-signal stat row: places walked / routes joined / friend count (friend count shown by default)
Bottom fixed action dock respecting sheetPeekClearance; CT.* fixed light cards
Action bar switches by relation: non-friend=[Add Friend]; friend=[Message][Invite to meetup]
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator: both relation states render correctly
userStories.notes: Mind CT.* fixed light cards (see project_ct_fixed_white_cards) + sheetPeekClearance (project_bottomsheet_peek_clearance).

userStories.title: FriendsListView + request inbox
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my friends and pending requests in one list.
acceptanceCriteria: Structure mirrors MyRequestsListView/RequestInboxView
Top 'pending requests' section (incoming) with [Accept]/[Decline] per row
Friends list below (avatar strip + list) tapping into FriendProfileView
Empty-state copy for no friends / no requests
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: Conversation: requestId optional + friendDirect type
userStories.description: As a developer, I need conversations not tied to a companion request so friends can DM directly.
acceptanceCriteria: companion.ts Conversation.requestId optional; ConversationType adds friendDirect
Swift Conversation.swift: requestId: CompanionRequestId? with decodeIfPresent
ConversationRecord.request_id column optional (lightweight migration); friendDirect isReadOnly always false
pnpm parity:check passes; xcodebuild test passes; existing companion conversation flow unbroken
userStories.notes: Backend column already relaxed in 0008. Blocking prerequisite for US-012.

userStories.title: Friend Message: lazy-create conversation + ChatView
userStories.description: As a user, I want to message a friend directly so we keep a persistent thread.
acceptanceCriteria: FriendProfileView [Message]: open existing conversationId, else FriendService.openDirectConversation lazily creates friendDirect conversation and writes back Friendship.conversationId
Reuse ChatView + ChatService; no route-card header; Report/Block menu also unfriends
Send/receive over existing Realtime channel chat:
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator: two sims exchange messages in real time

userStories.title: AddFriendSheet: my friend code + QR
userStories.description: As a user, I want a shareable friend code/QR so others can add me.
acceptanceCriteria: AddFriendSheet shows my code SOLO-XXXX-XXXX (excludes 0/O/1/I) + CoreImage QR
Code long-press copy / ShareLink share
Code mapped in backend friend_codes (lazily generated on first open)
[Rotate] button revokes old code (revoked_at) and issues a new one
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator: QR renders, copy works

userStories.title: AddFriendSheet: scan / enter code
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add someone by scanning their QR or typing their code.
acceptanceCriteria: [Scan]: AVFoundation QR scan with NSCameraUsageDescription
[Enter code]: manual SOLO-XXXX-XXXX entry with format validation + auto-uppercase/trim
Resolve code via redeem-friend-code Edge Function -> userId -> FriendProfileView preview -> confirm sends FriendRequest(source:.friendCode)
Invalid/revoked code: friendly error, no backend detail leak
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator (scan via pasted-code fallback)

userStories.title: Add-friend from companion chat / route group
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add someone I met through a companion activity as a friend.
acceptanceCriteria: ChatView (companion oneOnOne) participant has [Add Friend] -> sendRequest(source:.companionChat)
Route group participant list has [Add Friend] -> sendRequest(source:.routeGroup)
Button state changes when already friends / request pending
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: Add-friend from Discover (trust-gated)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add a stranger from discovery (with anti-abuse guardrails).
acceptanceCriteria: Discover post detail [Add Friend] -> sendRequest(source:.discover)
discover source gated by reporterWeight >= 0.3 + rate limit (frontend precheck + backend enforcement)
Request note capped at 120 chars
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: MeSheet unified conversation list
userStories.description: As a user, I want all conversations (friend DMs + companion chats) in one time-sorted list.
acceptanceCriteria: Messages section lists friendDirect + oneOnOne + groupRoute sorted by lastMessageAt desc
Each row: other emoji/handle (route name for groups) + last message preview + unread dot
Tap into the matching ChatView
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: Friend-request Realtime subscription
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see new friend requests without manual refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: FriendService subscribes friend_requests Realtime channel (filter recipient_id=eq.); new requests enter inbox live
RLS policy allows recipient to subscribe to own request rows
Inbox red dot updates live
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator: A sends, B sees red dot without refresh

userStories.title: Invite friend to companion meetup (no trust gate)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to invite a friend to hang out, skipping stranger-friction.
acceptanceCriteria: FriendProfileView [Invite to meetup] -> SendRequestSheet with recipient prefilled, source=friend, reporterWeight gate + safety consent skipped
Acceptance runs existing companion accept logic (builds oneOnOne conversation with requestId)
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: Invite friend into recruiting route (no approval)
userStories.description: As a route host, I want to invite friends straight into my recruiting route.
acceptanceCriteria: Host-view route detail / MyHostedRoutesListView [Invite Friends] -> pick friends -> directly into confirmedMembers (no approval, D-3)
Host only controls whether to invite; invited friend gets a join notification
Stranger JoinRouteRequestSheet approval flow unchanged; group participants + Realtime updated
xcodebuild build passes
Verify in Simulator

userStories.title: APNs infrastructure (register + token upload)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the app registered for remote push so we can notify users.
acceptanceCriteria: project.yml gains aps-environment entitlement; xcodegen regenerated
Services/PushTokenService.swift: registerForRemoteNotifications + didRegister(deviceToken) uploads token to device_push_tokens
Token rotation/invalidation: re-upload upserts; APNs feedback removes stale
Push permission requested at an appropriate (non-cold-start) moment
xcodebuild build passes
userStories.notes: Certificate config is manual (Apple Developer) — code side only; flag manual-verify steps.

userStories.title: redeem-friend-code Edge Function
userStories.description: As a user, I want my typed/scanned code to resolve to a profile to add.
acceptanceCriteria: infra/supabase/functions/redeem-friend-code: { code } + JWT -> { userId, handle, avatarEmoji } or 404
Rejects codes with revoked_at; code not reverse-lookupable (anti-enumeration)
Uses service role to bypass RLS for the redeem path only
Deploy command documented (supabase functions deploy redeem-friend-code)

userStories.title: friend-request-notify Edge Function -> APNs
userStories.description: As a user, I want a push when someone sends me a friend request.
acceptanceCriteria: infra/supabase/functions/friend-request-notify: { requestId } + JWT, looks up recipient token, sends APNs (token-based .p8 auth)
payload { type:friend_request, requesterHandle, requesterEmoji, requestId }
Triggered after FriendService.sendRequest success; NotificationService handles remote payload -> deep link to inbox
Deploy command documented; secrets (.p8/teamId/keyId) via Supabase secrets
userStories.notes: Live delivery needs APNs cert — flag manual-verify.

userStories.title: message-notify Edge Function -> APNs
userStories.description: As a user, I want a push when a friend messages me while backgrounded.
acceptanceCriteria: infra/supabase/functions/message-notify: triggered after chat message, looks up other-party token, sends APNs
payload { type:message, conversationId, senderHandle, preview (truncated) }; never push self
Tapping the notification deep-links to the matching ChatView
Deploy command documented
userStories.notes: Live delivery needs APNs cert — flag manual-verify.

userStories.title: Backend hardening: rate limit + request expiry
userStories.description: As a platform owner, I need anti-abuse and data hygiene on friend operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Per-user daily friend-request cap (e.g. 50) enforced at Edge/DB; over-limit returns 429
discover source double-checks reporterWeight gate server-side (do not trust client)
Pending requests past expires_at (+14d) set to expired (scheduled job, cleanupStaleRequests pattern)
Block dependency: blocked pairs cannot send requests or see each other (companion_blocks filter)
Tests cover rate-limit + expiry boundaries

userStories.title: Friend-code rotation + redeem hardening
userStories.description: As a user, I want my friend code rotatable so a leaked code can be invalidated.
acceptanceCriteria: redeem-friend-code rejects revoked codes; rotation invalidates old + activates new immediately
Concurrent redeem is idempotent; code not reverse-lookupable
Deploy + verify a revoked code fails to redeem

userStories.title: End-to-end loop verification doc
userStories.description: As QA, I need the full friend->companion->chat->upgrade loop verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Two-simulator script: scan-add-friend -> friend invites to meetup -> meetup builds group chat -> someone in group [Add Friend] -> mutual upgrade -> DM + push arrives
Flag-on with real backend passes; flag-off local does not crash
Regression checklist written to docs/qa/
No P0/P1 on critical paths
userStories.notes: Requires real Supabase + APNs cert — produce checklist for manual execution.
